Job_Description: About IIDE: IIDE is Asia’s most trusted digital marketing institute, offering government-recognised online, offline, and postgraduate programs. We empower students, graduates, and working professionals to transform their careers and stay future-ready in the ever-evolving digital landscape. About the Role: As a Digital Marketing Trainer at Delhi, you will play a pivotal role in delivering high-quality digital marketing education and enhancing the learning experience for students. This role involves conducting engaging training sessions, updating course curriculum in line with industry trends, and supporting students throughout their learning journey. You will ensure the highest standards of content delivery while contributing to the continuous improvement of IIDE’s digital marketing programs. What You’ll Do: ● Course Delivery & Content Creation: ○ Deliver course material as per the established curriculum. ○ Update and create course content aligned with the latest digital marketing trends and best practices. ○ Customize content delivery to suit individual and group learning needs. ● Engagement & Improvement: ○ Continuously refine teaching methods based on classroom feedback and experiences. ○ Stay updated with developments in Social Media Marketing, SEO, AdWords, Email Marketing, Mobile Marketing, ORM, and Website Development. ● Student Monitoring & Assessment: ○ Track student progress and provide actionable suggestions to bridge learning gaps. ○ Develop and evaluate assessments such as MCQs, pre-tests, and post-tests. ○ Maintain accurate records of sessions conducted and learning resources created. ● Classroom Management & Support: ○ Ensure a conducive learning environment, including IT setup and assessment management. ○ Proactively address issues that may impact the student learning experience. ● Additional Duties: ○ Contribute to the overall improvement of course quality and student satisfaction. ○ Support academic initiatives and collaborate with internal teams. ○ Perform any other reasonable duties as requested by management, aligned with the scope of the role. Requirements Who You Are: ● Must-Have: ○ 4+ years of practical experience in digital marketing, preferably in an educational setting. ○ Exceptional communication skills with confidence in conducting training sessions. ○ Proficiency in both written and spoken English. ○ Strong organizational skills with a commitment to punctuality. ○ Patience and empathy to address diverse learning needs. ○ Passion for teaching and digital marketing. ● Should Have: ○ Experience in customizing course content for varied audiences. ○ Ability to develop and evaluate educational tools like assessments and MCQs. ○ Strong knowledge across digital marketing domains such as Social Media Marketing, SEO, and AdWords. ○ Effective classroom management skills. ● Nice to Have: ○ Experience in delivering presentations or academic pitches. ○ Familiarity with the latest digital marketing tools and trends. ○ Experience working with a diverse student base.

Role Overview We are looking for a Placement Partnerships Associate who will be responsible for sourcing job opportunities, building employer relationships, and ensuring a continuous flow of live job openings for IIDE students and alumni. The ideal candidate should have experience in placements, recruitment consulting, staffing, corporate relations, or business development and should be comfortable engaging with hiring managers, agencies, brands, startups, and multinational companies. Key Responsibilities Employer Partnerships & Job Sourcing Source and onboard companies actively hiring for digital marketing and related roles. Identify job opportunities through LinkedIn, Naukri, company career pages, industry networks, and other hiring platforms. Run outreach campaigns through email, WhatsApp, LinkedIn, and calls to generate hiring partnerships. Build relationships with agencies, startups, SMEs, large enterprises, and Fortune 500 companies. Ensure a steady pipeline of live job opportunities across various functions, designations, experience levels, and salary brackets. Manage and guide a team responsible for job sourcing and database management. Handle inbound employer inquiries received through the website, official communication channels, and social media platforms. Present IIDE's credentials, placement outcomes, and student talent pool to prospective hiring partners. Facilitate agency visits, guest lectures, hiring drives, and employer engagement initiatives for students. Develop long-term relationships with repeat hiring partners and identify opportunities for bulk hiring requirements. Market Intelligence & Insights Set salary benchmarks for IIDE candidates across different roles, experience levels, and cities. Analyze hiring trends, job descriptions, compensation structures, and skill requirements prevalent in the market. Share regular market insights with senior management regarding: In-demand digital marketing skills Emerging job roles and hiring trends Salary benchmarks Industry demand across functions Repeat hiring clients Bulk hiring partners Talent shortages and opportunities Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) Number of new companies onboarded. Number of live jobs sourced and published. Number of interviews generated for students. Number of placement opportunities across salary bands. Repeat hiring partnerships generated. Employer engagement initiatives conducted. Placement conversion outcomes. Preferred Background Experience in a Placement Department, Career Services Team, Recruitment Consultancy, Staffing Agency, or Corporate Relations role. Strong communication, negotiation, and presentation skills. Comfortable with outbound outreach and relationship management. Ability to build credibility with HR leaders, founders, and hiring managers. Strong understanding of hiring trends and the digital marketing ecosystem. Success in This Role Success in this role will be measured by the ability to consistently bring quality job opportunities onto the IIDE platform, build long-term employer partnerships, and create strong placement outcomes for students and alumni.
